original_subject: build: add license and metadata to pyproject.toml
curated_subject: build: add license and metadata to pyproject.toml
diff:
diff --git a/pyproject.toml b/pyproject.toml
index f43f0cc..f0d133d 100644
--- a/pyproject.toml
+++ b/pyproject.toml
@@ -8,6 +8,22 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 description = "Dori terminal assistant"
 readme = "README.md"
 requires-python = ">=3.11,<4.0"
+license = "MIT"
+license-files = ["LICENSE"]
+authors = [{ name = "Mauricio" }]
+keywords = ["cli", "local-first", "ollama", "terminal", "assistant"]
+classifiers = [
+    "Development Status :: 3 - Alpha",
+    "Environment :: Console",
+    "Intended Audience :: Developers",
+    "Operating System :: OS Independent",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.11",
+    "Programming Language :: Python :: 3.12",
+    "Topic :: Scientific/Engineering :: Artificial Intelligence",
+    "Topic :: Software Development :: User Interfaces",
+    "Topic :: Utilities",
+]
 dependencies = [
     "rich>=13.0.0",
     "ollama>=0.2.0",
@@ -19,11 +35,32 @@ dependencies = [
 [project.scripts]
 dori = "dori.main:run"
 
+[project.urls]
+Homepage = "https://github.com/mtdb/dori"
+Repository = "https://github.com/mtdb/dori"
+Issues = "https://github.com/mtdb/dori/issues"
+
 [project.optional-dependencies]
 dev = ["pytest>=8.0", "ruff", "mypy", "pre-commit"]
 
 [tool.setuptools]
-packages = ["dori"]
+include-package-data = true
+
+[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
+include = ["dori*"]
+namespaces = true
+
+[tool.setuptools.package-data]
+dori = [
+    "tui.tcss",
+    "boilerplate/*.md",
+    "boilerplate/assets/*",
+    "boilerplate/presets/reminders/*",
+    "boilerplate/presets/search/*",
+    "boilerplate/scripts/*",
+    "boilerplate/skills/*",
+    "boilerplate/skills/devtools/*",
+]
 
 [tool.poetry]
 packages = [{ include = "dori" }]
recent_subjects: build(dori): Add bundled boilerplate directory and modify commands to use it
docs: clarify what Dori is and how it works
refactor(commands): remove legacy persona migration function and related tests
test(tests): update tests for chat and commit workflow changes
fix(dori): disallow script interaction in ConversationEngine by default
